meaning: 1. a flourishing period; 2. period of prosperity; 3. a golden age
sentence: 唐朝是中国历史上著名的盛世。
pinyin: Táng cháo shì Zhōngguó lìshǐ shàng zhùmíng de shèngshì.
english: The Tang Dynasty was a famous golden age in Chinese history.

sentence: 这家公司的版图已扩展到海外。
pinyin: Zhè jiā gōngsī de bǎntú yǐ kuòzhǎn dào hǎiwài.
english: This company's territory has already expanded overseas.

meaning: 1. to turn one's head; 2. in no time; 3. in the twinkling of an e
sentence: 他转脸就把刚才说的话忘了。
pinyin: Tā zhuǎn liǎn jiù bǎ gāngcái shuō de huà wàng le.
english: He forgot what he just said in the blink of an eye.

sentence: 老师在课堂上展开了一张世界地图。
pinyin: Lǎoshī zài kètáng shàng zhǎnkāi le yī zhāng shìjiè dìtú.
english: The teacher unfolded a world map in class.

meaning: 1. to sort; 2. to arrange in order
sentence: 你可以按名字对这些文件进行排序。
pinyin: Nǐ kěyǐ àn míngzi duì zhèxiē wénjiàn jìnxíng páixù.
english: You can sort these files by name.
